name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, unflagged exceptions cause processing delays. We monitor claims and flag exceptions instead of manual review of claims.
problem_solved: delays in processing claims due to unflagged exceptions
